@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the final execute_python step (function-call-8116279331602593837), the agent counted every README.md record in the contents table that matched a non-Python repo without deduplicating by repository, inflating the denominator and thus returning 0.1683 instead of the unique-repo-based proportion (1/3).

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed the metric by pulling all contents rows whose sample_path matched '%README.md%' (query var_function-call-67416086529910507) and counting any such files across non‑Python repos, rather than restricting to the intended (root) README.md files, resulting in a much larger denominator and a different proportion.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent filtered README files with sample_path ILIKE '%README.md' (function-call-8738018514313708997) and then counted all matches per repository rather than the single top-level README.md per repo, inflating the denominator and yielding a proportion far from the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no

FM4: yes

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent defined "repositories that do not use Python" by merely checking if the languages.language_description string lacked the substring "Python" (execute_python: if 'Python' not in desc), which is an invalid plan that misclassifies repositories and inflates the README count (101 vs. the ground-truth 3), yielding an incorrect proportion.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After selecting non-Python repositories from metadata_database.languages, the agent queried artifacts_database.contents with sample_path LIKE '%README.md' and, in execute_python, counted all README.md files per repository (function-call-5318616242334808465 and function-call-12788197626613195655) instead of restricting to a single canonical/root README per repo, inflating the denominator and yielding an incorrect proportion.
